sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7579" key="a)nasurto/lis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνασυρτόλις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7579.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lewd woman,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
